# dApp Kit
> Build Sui dApps with @mysten/dapp-kit-core and @mysten/dapp-kit-react

- [Sui dApp Kit](..md): Build Sui apps with framework-agnostic core and React bindings.
- [@mysten/create-dapp](./getting-started/create-dapp.md): Create a Sui app with one command using the create-dapp CLI scaffolding tool.
- [React](./getting-started/react.md): Set up dApp Kit in a React application.
- [Next.js](./getting-started/next-js.md): Set up dApp Kit in a Next.js application.
- [Vue](./getting-started/vue.md): Set up dApp Kit in a Vue application.
- [DApp Kit Instance](./dapp-kit-instance.md): Create and configure a DAppKit instance for wallet and client management
- [State](./state.md): Access and subscribe to wallet connection state in dApp Kit.
- [Connect Wallet](./actions/connect-wallet.md): Programmatically connect to a Sui wallet using the dApp Kit connectWallet action.
- [Disconnect Wallet](./actions/disconnect-wallet.md): Programmatically disconnect from a Sui wallet using the dApp Kit disconnectWallet action.
- [Sign and Execute Transaction](./actions/sign-and-execute-transaction.md): Sign and execute a transaction on the Sui network using the connected wallet.
- [Sign Personal Message](./actions/sign-personal-message.md): Sign an arbitrary message with the connected wallet for authentication or proof of ownership.
- [Sign Transaction](./actions/sign-transaction.md): Sign a Sui transaction without executing it for deferred or multi-signature scenarios.
- [Switch Account](./actions/switch-account.md): Switch the active account in the connected wallet using the dApp Kit switchAccount action.
- [Switch Network](./actions/switch-network.md): Switch the active network for the dApp Kit instance between mainnet, testnet, and other networks.
- [DAppKitProvider](./react/dapp-kit-provider.md): React context provider that makes dApp Kit available throughout your application.
- [React Hooks](./react/hooks.md): React hooks for accessing dApp Kit state and actions in Sui applications.
- [useDAppKit](./react/hooks/use-dapp-kit.md): React hook to access the full dApp Kit instance for calling actions directly.
- [useCurrentAccount](./react/hooks/use-current-account.md): React hook to get the currently selected wallet account in a Sui dApp.
- [useCurrentClient](./react/hooks/use-current-client.md): React hook to get the current Sui client instance for the active network.
- [useCurrentNetwork](./react/hooks/use-current-network.md): React hook to get the currently selected Sui network in dApp Kit.
- [useCurrentWallet](./react/hooks/use-current-wallet.md): React hook to get the currently connected wallet in a Sui dApp.
- [useWalletConnection](./react/hooks/use-wallet-connection.md): React hook to manage wallet connection status and information in a Sui dApp.
- [useWallets](./react/hooks/use-wallets.md): React hook to list all available Sui wallets detected by dApp Kit.
- [React Components](./react/components.md): Pre-built React UI components for wallet interaction in Sui dApps.
- [Connect Button](./react/components/connect-button.md): React button component for connecting and disconnecting Sui wallets.
- [Connect Modal](./react/components/connect-modal.md): React modal component for selecting and connecting to a Sui wallet.
- [Connect Button](./web-components/connect-button.md): Framework-agnostic web component providing a complete wallet connection UI for Sui dApps.
- [Connect Modal](./web-components/connect-modal.md): Framework-agnostic web component for wallet selection and connection in Sui dApps.
- [Theming](./theming.md): Customize the appearance of dApp Kit UI components.
- [Sui dApp Kit (Legacy)](./legacy.md): Legacy dApp Kit API reference for the deprecated @mysten/dapp-kit package using JSON RPC.
